- For buses, always **board from the front door and exit from the rear door**; the card reader at the front door is usually located behind the driver's seat.

- **Also, stores do not accept outside trash, so if you bring your own iced drink, it's best to finish it and throw it away at the attraction or department store before leaving, otherwise it can be troublesome.**

- For two or more people, you can just take a taxi comfortably. Busan has many taxis that are cheap, new, and very convenient.

- Please confirm the direction before entering the subway station

translations.一樓機台點完餐拿號碼牌上二樓找位子 (應該要先上去看有沒有位子)\n: Order at the machine on the first floor, take a number ticket, then go upstairs to find a seat (you should check for available seats first).
translations.一樣把總結寫在前面「韓國釜山雖然沒有日本的寧靜跟秩序，但是有隨性跟人情味」。\n: Summary: Although Busan, South Korea, lacks the quietness and order of Japan, it offers a relaxed atmosphere and warmth of human connection.
translations.一路上很熱鬧、很多吃的餐廳。\n\n: The whole way was lively, with many restaurants to eat at.
translations.一路從龍頭山公園下山。\n\n: Descended all the way down from Yongdusan Park.
translations.一路看看風景拍拍網美照(?)\n\n: Enjoy the scenery and take some trendy photos along the way (?)
translations.上來已經有很多人在等了。\n\n: There were already many people waiting when I arrived.
translations.上船要穿救生衣，坐到第二層最前面的位子。\n\n: Wear a life jacket when boarding the boat and sit in the front seat on the second level.
translations.上面可以眺望隔壁的樂天樂園。\n\n: You can overlook the adjacent Lotte World from above.
translations.下來就是紀念品中心跟可以買中途拍的照片。\n\n: Next are the souvenir centers and places where you can buy photos taken along the way.
translations.下公車大約還要走 10 分鐘，太熱了，先去超商調一杯自製咖啡拿鐵消暑。\n\n: After getting off the bus, there's about a 10-minute walk. It's too hot, so I first went to a convenience store to get a self-made iced latte to cool down.
translations.下山一路下坡，一片黑：\n\n: Going downhill all the way, everything is dark:
translations.下山之前記得去外面無人售票處 (Ticket Box) 機台：\n\n: Before heading down the mountain, remember to go to the outdoor unmanned ticket machine (Ticket Box):
translations.下車後傻了，依然是很抖的山坡路，從這邊一路往上走：\n\n: After getting off, I was stunned; it was still a very steep and shaky hillside. From here, I walked all the way up:
translations.下車後在月台看到往 2 樓的樓梯就是膠囊列車的乘車處了。\n\n: After getting off, you can see the stairs to the 2nd floor on the platform, which lead to the Capsule Train boarding area.
translations.不知道要買什麼，去超商買了兩罐 GD 酒帶回台灣。\n\n: Not sure what to buy, so I got two cans of GD liquor from the convenience store to bring back to Taiwan.
translations.不管是哪一種都建議行前先在台灣用信用卡(因為有可能只支援某些發卡機構)先加值好或: For any type, it is recommended to top up in Taiwan using a credit card (since some machines may only support certain card issuers) or bring some cash to Korea to top up at the machines. [Naver Map](https://map.naver.com/p/){:target="_blank"}
translations.中途不能停、中途不能停、中途不能停，完全停下來就很難繼續滑動了\n: No stopping midway, no stopping midway, no stopping midway; if you stop completely, it's very hard to keep sliding.
translations.中途會經過幾個觀景平台，因為太熱就沒下去了。\n\n: We passed by several observation decks along the way but didn't get off because it was too hot.
translations.二樓邊邊有很多自助報到機，直接在這邊按一按報到、劃位；可以看到三樓也很多吃的跟商: There are many self check-in kiosks along the edge of the second floor where you can check in and select seats. You can also see that the third floor has many food options and shops.
translations.人都集中站換票、買票櫃檯，後面搭纜車跟滑坡車都不用怎麼排隊，纜車上去的途中可以看: People all gather at the ticket exchange and purchase counters. There is hardly any queue for the cable car and luge ride afterward. During the cable car ride, you can see the track below. It takes about 5 minutes to reach the starting point.
translations.今年 iPhone 可以直接用 Apple 錢包交通卡裡的 Tmoney，可以直: This year, iPhone can directly use the Tmoney in the Apple Wallet transit card, allowing easy top-up and use; however, I had already [topped up a physical card purchased last year](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/18161-t-money-public-transit-card-pick-up-at-taiwan-taoyuan-international-airport-south-korea?cid=19365){:target="_blank"}, so I didn't use it.
translations.但是因為時間晚了，所以只走馬看花；靠海岸這邊有很多咖啡廳跟小店，但不知道是不是因: But since it was late, we just took a quick look around; there are many cafes and small shops along the coast, but maybe because it was late, there weren’t many people. The coastal walkway below was under maintenance and inaccessible. The weather was cloudy today, so the scenery wasn’t great.
translations.但更悲劇的事是 — 他關門了！他關門了！他關門了！\n\n: But the more tragic thing is — it closed! It closed! It closed!
translations.位置在樂天百貨對面的商店街。\n: Located in the shopping street opposite Lotte Department Store.
translations.住的位子會先經過海雲台傳統市場有賣很多吃的。\n\n: The accommodation is located near Haeundae Traditional Market, which offers a wide variety of food.
translations.使用釜山 Pass 欲搭乘釜山遊艇之旅，需要先跟船家預約，我們是選 Y Holi: To use the Busan Pass for the Busan Yacht Tour, you need to make a reservation with the boat operator first. We chose Y Holic as an example.
translations.個人物品要小心不要掉了\n: Be careful not to lose your personal belongings.
translations.傍晚休息完又再出門，主要是要去福泉寺拍夜景，先去白淺灣文化村看看。\n\n: After resting in the evening, we went out again, mainly to visit Bokcheon Temple for night views. First, we checked out Baeksan Bay Cultural Village.
translations.先去 B1 美食街咖啡廳隨便吃個東西當早餐。(普普，咖啡是 Lungo)\n\n: First, head to the B1 food court cafe to grab a casual breakfast. (So-so, the coffee was Lungo)
translations.先去機場的超商買一些小東西補充熱量，還有換錢跟休息了一下。\n\n: First, went to the convenience store at the airport to buy some snacks for energy, exchanged money, and took a short rest.
translations.先在橋下看，大約 20:05 開的差不多在移動上去。\n\n: First, watch from under the bridge. Around 20:05, when it’s almost done, start moving up.
translations.先陪 Sean 儲值交通卡，這邊有兩台可以儲值交通卡的機器 (Self Serv: First, accompany Sean to top up the transportation card. There are two machines here for topping up transportation cards (Self Service Charger), **and you can only add value in multiples of 1000 KRW**.
translations.兩人以上其實可以直接計程車搭到爽，釜山計程車很多又便宜又都很新很方便\n: For two or more people, you can just take a taxi comfortably. Busan has many taxis that are cheap, new, and very convenient.
translations.公車一律 **前門上車，後門下車** ；前門刷卡處一般在司機座位側後方\n: For buses, always **board from the front door and exit from the rear door**; the card reader at the front door is usually located behind the driver's seat.
translations.公車站下車後走到對面往下就能看到了。\n\n: After getting off at the bus stop, walk across the street and down to see it.
translations.再去海雲台海灘晃了一下才回飯店休息。\n\n: Went for a stroll at Haeundae Beach again before heading back to the hotel to rest.
translations.再去買了一杯 Liter 藍莓冰沙優格解膩。\n\n: Bought another Liter of blueberry smoothie yogurt to refresh the palate.
translations.出 Skyline Luge 後對面直直走就是海東龍宮寺了，大約需步行 10 分: After exiting Skyline Luge, walk straight across the street to reach Haedong Yonggungsa Temple. It takes about a 10-minute uphill walk.
translations.出來直接右轉往下走。\n\n: Turn right immediately and walk down.
translations.出發前先在新世界百貨 B1 買了吃了一些東西果腹。\n\n: Before departure, I bought and ate some food at Shinsegae Department Store B1 to fill my stomach.
translations.出站要再走約 15 分鐘才會到碼頭。\n\n: After exiting the station, it takes about 15 minutes on foot to reach the pier.
translations.到了之後想說直接在地鐵站寄物，其他地方：樂天百貨也能寄放行李。\n\n: After arriving, I thought about storing my luggage directly at the subway station. Other places like Lotte Department Store also offer luggage storage.
translations.到機場後直接上二樓國際線出發。\n\n: After arriving at the airport, go directly to the second floor for international departures.
translations.刷卡進站後請找前往沙上(Sasang Station)的月台，下一站是「西釜山流: After swiping your card to enter, please find the platform heading to Sasang Station. The next stop is "West Busan Distribution Area."
translations.前幾天來只去了 Spa Land 沒有逛到，這次來補逛。\n\n: A few days ago, I only visited Spa Land and didn't explore the rest. This time, I'm making up for it.
translations.原本看 Map 說公車只搭一站，想說用走的就好，走幾步之後就放棄了；地圖寫公車: Originally, the map said the bus was only one stop away, so I thought I could just walk. After a few steps, I gave up; the map showed the bus was 1 stop (1 minute), but walking actually took about 20 minutes (all steep and shaky hills).
translations.去 Kodak 店買了幾件衣服(平均比台灣代購便宜 NT$300–$500)\n:
Bought a few clothes at the Kodak store (on average NT$300–$500 cheaper than buying through Taiwan resellers).  
The store offers direct tax refund.
translations.去完三溫暖就去日光浴區躺著曬太陽了，點了一杯飲料(超甜)。\n\n: After the sauna, I went to the sunbathing area to lie down and soak up the sun, and ordered a drink (super sweet).
translations.去年 [**2024 年「二訪九州 9 日自由行，經釜山→博多郵輪入境」**](: Last year, during the [**2024 "Second Visit to Kyushu 9-Day Free Travel, Entering via Busan→Hakata Cruise"**](../cb65fd5ab770/), I entered Japan Fukuoka by ship from Busan, South Korea. That time, I only spent a short morning in Busan, briefly visiting Haedong Yonggungsa Temple and Haeundae. This July–August, with some work breaks, I set off again to explore Busan more deeply, this time with my equally free-spirited Pinkoi colleague Sean.
translations.去超商買了水蜜桃酒配剛剛買的章魚燒，我覺得這個章魚燒很讚，雖然帶回來已經軟掉，但: Bought peach wine at the convenience store to go with the takoyaki I just got. I think this takoyaki is great. Although it got soft after bringing it back, it's made with black squid ink batter, has the crispiness of Taiwanese takoyaki, and is paired with Korean spicy sauce. Very delicious. 😋
translations.另外今年開始也能直接透過 [Wowpass App](https://wowpa: Starting this year, you can also top up your transportation card directly through the [Wowpass App](https://wowpass.io/zh-TW){:target="_blank"}. The process involves first loading money onto Wowpass using a credit card, then transferring funds from Wowpass to Tmoney. This method has more steps and requires a handling fee.
translations.另外又再買了一盒 [BHC 炸雞](https://naver.me/xww9n: Also bought another box of [BHC Fried Chicken](https://naver.me/xww9nJx2){:target="_blank"} to have for dinner.
translations.另外還買了一個鹹的麵包，也不錯！\n: Also bought a savory bread, which was pretty good!
translations.只推薦：藍莓優格冰沙(Yogurt Smoothie — Blueberry)，: Only recommend: Blueberry Yogurt Smoothie, available in 600ML or 1,000ML sizes; refreshing and not too sweet, won't make you feel more thirsty. Price is about 4,300 KRW.
translations.可以透過身份認證重新啟用帳號，不過我不確定是忘記名字填什麼還是因為外國人無法通過: You can reactivate your account through identity verification, but I'm not sure if it's because I forgot what name to enter or if foreigners can't pass the real-name verification. No matter what I entered, it always showed incorrect information, and eventually, the account got permanently locked.
translations.吃了一根魚板香腸補充熱量(味道普普)。\n\n: Ate a fish cake sausage stick to boost energy (taste was average).
translations.吃了好幾天重口味食物，午餐想吃清淡一點。\n\n: After eating heavy-flavored food for several days, I wanted something lighter for lunch.
translations.吃完之後走回樂天百貨。\n\n: After eating, walk back to Lotte Department Store.
translations.吃完午餐走出來就是大家激推的釜山蜂蜜奶油吐司 [DIART COFFEE](ht: After lunch, we stepped out to the highly recommended Busan Honey Butter Toast at [DIART COFFEE](https://naver.me/GkUJQI6r){:target="_blank"}. We ordered one toast (₩10,000) and a coffee (₩5,500) to take a break.
translations.吃完又去海雲台大街走走、海雲台傳統市場(忘了吃海鮮煎餅，可惡！)跟買伴手禮；明天: After eating, we went for a walk along Haeundae Street, visited Haeundae Traditional Market (forgot to try the seafood pancake, so frustrating!), and bought some souvenirs. Tomorrow we will leave Haeundae.
translations.吃飽到百貨公司頂樓觀景台晃晃，(超曬、超熱)。\n\n: After eating, stroll around the department store rooftop observatory (very sunny and hot).
translations.吃飽後再一路走到釜山塔，消化一下，大約 20 分鐘。\n\n: After eating, walk all the way to Busan Tower to digest a bit, about 20 minutes.
translations.吃飽後又逛了一下。\n\n: After eating, we strolled around a bit more.
translations.告知人數、日期、時段、Email 或聯繫方式跟 釜山 Pass 的 QR Cod: Provide the number of people, date, time slot, email or contact information, and the QR Code for the Busan Pass.
translations.呼叫器好像有點問題，其實早做好了只是沒響。\n\n: The pager seemed to have some issues; it was actually ready earlier but didn't ring.
translations.回到海雲台後就走路＋搭公車前往新世界 Spa Land 了。\n\n: After returning to Haeundae, I walked and took a bus to Shinsegae Spa Land.
translations.回陸地後就搭公車回海雲台了。\n\n: After returning to the mainland, I took the bus back to Haeundae.
translations.回飯店前買了 BIFF 廣場蠻多人排的 [種子糖餅](https://naver: Before returning to the hotel, I bought the [Seed Sugar Cake](https://naver.me/5eZTZe4y){:target="_blank"} at BIFF Square, where many people were lining up. I found it greasy and too sweet, not very impressive.
translations.因為 [**去年有來過了**](../cb65fd5ab770/) ，所以這次只: Since I [**visited last year**](../cb65fd5ab770/), this time I just took a quick look around.
translations.因為不會韓文所以直接拍照只給店員看就要這個\n: Since I don't speak Korean, I just took a photo and showed it to the staff to order this.
translations.因為怕機場網路不好，所以先在 [台灣啟用 eSIM](https://zhgch: Because I was worried about poor airport Wi-Fi, I activated the eSIM in Taiwan first via [Taiwan eSIM Activation](https://zhgchg.li/posts/aacd5f5cacd1/#%E4%BA%8B%E5%85%88%E5%95%9F%E7%94%A8-esim-iphone-%E7%82%BA%E4%BE%8B){:target="_blank"}.
translations.因為昨天只在青沙浦轉乘沒特別逛，今天又來。\n\n: Because I only transferred at Cheongsapo yesterday without exploring, I came again today.
translations.因為落地釜山後就要直接趕去飯店，所以在台灣先吃飽飽。\n\n: Since we had to head straight to the hotel after landing in Busan, we ate well in Taiwan beforehand.
translations.因為行程安排分散在這 8 天，加上想去的景點就那些，我們 **選擇買兩張 BIG: Because the itinerary is spread over these 8 days and the attractions we want to visit are limited, we **chose to buy two BIG5 passes.**
translations.在一樓櫃檯出示釜山 Pass 換門票進入。\n\n: Show the Busan Pass at the first-floor counter to exchange for an entrance ticket.
translations.在商店街逛了逛，這裡有一家 HBAF 杏仁果專賣店，應該是口味最齊全的地方；買了: Strolled around the shopping street and found an HBAF almond specialty store, which seems to have the most complete range of flavors. Bought the Yellow combo pack (with small bags inside) along with some unique flavors (popping candy that really pops, spicy stir-fried rice cakes) and popular flavors (honey, Oreo, corn) as souvenirs.
translations.在海雲台都沒逛 OY，剛好有時間先來看看，這家店很大店員很多也都很親切。\n\n: I didn't get to explore Haeundae at all OY, so I took the time to check it out. This store is very large, with many friendly staff.
translations.地鐵札嘎其站出來走路約 5 分鐘、對街就是 BIFF 廣場，有窗戶、雙人雙床房。: About a 5-minute walk from Jagalchi Subway Station, directly across the street is BIFF Square. The room has windows and twin beds.
translations.地鐵請確認方向後再進站\n: Please confirm the direction before entering the subway station
translations.地點還算方便，走路到海雲台大街大約 10 分鐘，有窗但無海景、雙人雙床房。\n\: The location is quite convenient, about a 10-minute walk to Haeundae Main Street. The room has windows but no sea view, with twin beds for two people.
translations.坐到第二排的位子，風景還不錯。\n\n: Sitting in the second row, the view is quite nice.
translations.外面很曬，越接近 14:00 聚集的人越來越多；此時 **有一個阿珠嬤走過來跟我: It's very sunny outside, and more people gather as it gets closer to 14:00; at this time, **an ajumma came over and told us that from 8/2 to 8/30, due to the heat, the event is moved to 20:00!! Shocking!!** Then people started spreading the news that it was changed to 20:00, and everyone slowly began to leave.
translations.夜間場次 (18:00) 開始 **每個人需要另外收 $5,000 韓元** ，: For the night session (18:00), **an additional fee of 5,000 KRW per person** is required. You can pay on-site or transfer in advance.
translations.大約 00:00 後攤販就都清空了。\n\n: Around 00:00, the street vendors all clear out.
translations.大約 10:30 開始排換票 (釜山 Pass 需要換票後才能使用)，人蠻多的，: Around 10:30, we started lining up to exchange tickets (the Busan Pass must be exchanged before use). There were quite a few people, and we waited about 20 minutes to get the tickets. The Busan Pass allows you to choose between riding the luge twice or once on the luge and once on the zipline. Most people chose to ride the luge twice.
translations.大約 10:XX 出門，樂天百貨 10:30 開始營業，慢慢走去。\n\n: Leave around 10:XX, Lotte Department Store opens at 10:30, walk there leisurely.
translations.大約 11:55 就到海東龍宮寺攤販入口。\n\n: Arrived at the Haedong Yonggungsa Temple vendor entrance around 11:55.
translations.大約 13:50 車就會到，人群開始騷動排隊。\n\n: Around 13:50, the bus will arrive, and the crowd starts to stir and line up.
translations.大約 13:50 開櫃報到，約 14:10 完成報到＋托運。\n\n: Check-in counters open around 13:50, with check-in and baggage drop completed by about 14:10.
translations.大約 20 分鐘後就會到達廣安里海灘前的海域，可以看到很多玩 SUP 的遊客；會: About 20 minutes later, we will arrive at the waters in front of Gwangalli Beach, where many visitors are playing SUP. We will stop here and set off fireworks. The fireworks are lit together by the crew members of the yachts sailing during this time, but it's still quite bright, so it's hard to see clearly.
translations.大約 22:00 釜山開始下雨！還好我們旅程快結束了。\n\n: Around 22:00, it started raining in Busan! Luckily, our trip was almost over.
translations.大約等了 30 多分鐘才入場。\n\n: Waited for about 30 minutes before entering.
translations.如果不是立即退稅的就要到這邊刷單據條碼換退稅單，最後到機場再退錢。(有點麻煩)\: If it's not an immediate tax refund, you need to scan the receipt barcode here to exchange for a tax refund slip, and then get the money back at the airport. (A bit troublesome)
translations.如果很怕開放式纜車的，這次去有看到旁邊另一條箱型式纜車感覺也快開通了(?)。\n: If you are afraid of open-air cable cars, I noticed another cabin-style cable car nearby that seems to be opening soon(?).
translations.如果您喜歡我的遊記歡迎透過我的推廣連結購買 [韓國釜山通行證 VISIT BUS: If you enjoy my travelogue, feel free to purchase the [Korea Busan Pass VISIT BUSAN PASS](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/138477-visit-busan-pass-discount-free-attractions?cid=19365){:target="_blank"} through my referral link. I will receive a small commission. Thank you.
translations.如果有退稅單要退稅，記得 [照這篇文章](https://www.funlida:
If you have a tax refund slip to claim, remember to follow [this article](https://www.funliday.com/posts/2024-korea-tax-refund/){:target="_blank"} for the process.  
I lost my tax refund slip...
translations.小延誤 15 分鐘起飛，座位蠻小的。\n\n: Slight delay of 15 minutes for takeoff, the seats are quite small.
translations.小菜會有一顆維他命C (查了一下吃燒烤前或後補充維他命 C 可以減少自由基產生降: The side dishes include a piece of vitamin C (I checked, and taking vitamin C before or after barbecue can reduce free radicals and lower the risk of cancer).
translations.就能持憑證去外面藍色房子的紀念品中心(不是釜山塔一樓那個)兌換小獎品。\n: You can use the voucher to redeem small prizes at the souvenir center in the blue building outside (not the one on the first floor of Busan Tower).
translations.店內位子很多不用排隊，直接進來了。\n\n: There were many seats available inside, so we came in without waiting.
translations.店員說回去要冰，吃之前退冰半小時到一小時最好吃\n: The staff said to keep it refrigerated when you get home, and it's best to thaw it for half an hour to an hour before eating.
translations.往下走到咖啡廳、紀念品店可以回望剛剛膠囊列車來的路線。\n\n: Walking down to the café and souvenir shop, you can look back at the route the capsule train just took.
translations.往樂天百貨的路上有一家「Big Shop」釜山紀念品店專賣店，有很多 Boogi: On the way to Lotte Department Store, there is a "Big Shop" Busan souvenir store that specializes in Boogi and Busan-themed merchandise.
translations.後來帶回飯店吃，艾草糕糯糯的口感配上黃豆粉跟紅豆奶油內餡，我覺得蠻特別的，稍微有: Later, I took it back to the hotel to eat. The mugwort rice cake has a chewy texture paired with soybean powder and red bean cream filling. I found it quite unique and slightly sweet. If you pass by, give it a try!

translations.這裡才是開始，要再一路爬很抖的山坡路往上到底才是福泉寺：\n\n: This is just the beginning; you still have to climb a very shaky hillside all the way up to reach Bogwansa Temple:
translations.這邊只要一路跟著地上的綠色指示就能從輕軌出站轉地鐵綠線，往「 **萇山** 」方: Just follow the green signs on the ground to transfer from the light rail to the subway Green Line, heading towards "**Changsan**" (the other direction is "**Yangsan**," don't confuse the characters). The next stop is "Gamcheon."
translations.這邊完全沒遮蔭，大太陽下很曬，可以鳥瞰整個松島纜車。\n\n: There is no shade here at all, very sunny and hot, but you can get a bird's-eye view of the entire Songdo Cable Car.
translations.這邊有很多攤販、地板有明星的手印。\n\n: There are many street vendors here, and the floor has celebrities' handprints.
translations.這邊的景色很好，可以眺望整個釜山南浦。\n\n: The view here is great, offering a full overlook of Busan's Nampo area.
translations.逛完接近中午，到附近的市場吃刀韓式削麵。\n\n: After shopping until nearly noon, head to a nearby market to eat Korean-style knife-cut noodles.
translations.逛完樂高店，不知道要去哪就改坐公車去逛新世界百貨了。\n\n: After visiting the LEGO store, not sure where to go next, so I took the bus to explore Shinsegae Department Store.
translations.逛累了就去 B1 買了韓國的紅豆和桃果子跟老配方自己調的超商手搖(冰杯+香蕉牛奶: When tired from walking, I went to B1 to buy Korean red bean and peach snacks, along with a convenience store hand-shaken drink made with an old recipe (iced cup + banana milk + unsweetened black coffee), then took the underground street back to the hotel to rest.
translations.逛累了，中午時分就去 B1 吃 Downtown 漢堡；道理我都懂，但是美式漢堡: After getting tired from walking, we went to B1 for Downtown Burgers at noon; I get it, but American burgers also offer kimchi!
translations.進來之後排櫃檯兌換釜山 Pass 纜車車票(Pass 是水晶車廂、 **來回，所: After entering, line up at the counter to exchange your Busan Pass for the cable car ticket (Pass is for the crystal cabin, **round trip, so keep the ticket safe**).
translations.進去會發一個感應手環，用手環寄放鞋子、衣物，在場內換汗蒸幕專用衣服，也可以先去三: You will receive a sensor wristband upon entry. Use the wristband to store your shoes and clothes. Change into the special sauna clothes inside. You can also visit the sauna first (full nudity required) before going to the sauna rooms. The sauna entrance is in the direction of the women's changing room.
translations.適時轉彎前減速不然會翻車\n: Slow down before turning to avoid flipping over.
translations.釜山塔憑門票掃描 QRCord 可以玩解謎遊戲，解出所有密碼可以得到一個小獎品。: You can scan the QR code on your Busan Tower ticket to play a puzzle game. Solving all the codes will earn you a small prize. (I have written the codes later on)
translations.釜山的公車幾乎都是全新的電車、冷氣很涼\n: Bus in Busan are almost all brand new electric buses with very cool air conditioning.
translations.釜山的避暑措施做得蠻好的，路上等紅綠燈有陽傘、公車站幾乎都有風扇，可以按一下啟動: Busan has good heat relief measures. There are umbrellas at traffic lights, and most bus stops have fans that you can turn on with a button.
translations.釜山航空免費額度只有：15 KG\n: Busan Air's free baggage allowance is only: 15 KG
translations.門口有一台機器可以候位，輸入信箱會收到通知，17:50 來就開始小排隊了。\n\: There is a machine at the entrance for waiting. Enter your email to receive a notification. At 17:50, a small queue started to form.
translations.開得很慢、不會太晃，一路前往穿過廣安大橋。\n\n: It runs slowly and smoothly, heading all the way across Gwangandaegyo Bridge.
translations.附近先隨便找了一家有吃的店吃午餐 ( [Gohyang katsu](https: Nearby, I randomly picked a place to have lunch ([Gohyang katsu](https://naver.me/GlGmYxyY){:target="_blank"}). I ordered a pork cutlet sandwich; the meat was thick, tender, and reasonably priced.
translations.除了咖啡廳、紀念品店，這層也有免費的展覽。\n\n: Besides the cafes and souvenir shops, this floor also has free exhibitions.
translations.隔壁就是 Olive Young 新開的 Delight Project 專賣店: Next door is the newly opened Olive Young Delight Project store, where I did some shopping; many items are buy two get one free, and you can get an instant tax refund on purchases over 15,000 KRW.
translations.隨意逛了逛，基本上所有品牌、所有類型的櫃位都有。\n\n: Strolled around casually; basically, all brands and all types of counters are available.
translations.離場之前還有很多可以拍照的點。\n\n: There are still many photo spots before leaving.
translations.離開白淺灣後就要往上前往福泉寺。\n\n: After leaving Baishan Bay, head up to Fuchuan Temple.
translations.電子版直接出示訂單 QRCode 使用\n: Show the order QR code directly on the electronic version for use
translations.韓國免簽證，只需出發前三天提前在 [線上填好入境申請表](https://www: South Korea offers visa-free entry. You only need to fill out the [online entry application form](https://www.e-arrivalcard.go.kr/portal/apply/agreementPolicy.do?applyType=P){:target="_blank"} three days before departure, and you can complete immigration upon arrival with just your passport.
translations.預約 18:30 的場次，需提前去集合點名。\n\n: Reservation for the 18:30 session requires arriving early at the meeting point for roll call.
translations.領完票就直接搭手扶梯上樓排隊等纜車。(有發棒棒糖但我沒拿)\n\n: After getting the ticket, take the escalator upstairs to line up for the cable car. (They gave out lollipops, but I didn't take one)
translations.食用方式可參考 [小卡](https://m.site.naver.com/1A: You can refer to the [card](https://m.site.naver.com/1Abyy){:target="_blank"} for how to eat it. In short, cut the bread into pieces first, then evenly spread butter and honey before eating.
translations.飯店出來對面就是 BIFF 廣場，很熱鬧、方便。\n\n: Right outside the hotel is BIFF Square, which is lively and convenient.
translations.飯店在機場的上一站 — 西釜山流通地区站，對街有 CU/GS25 超商。\n\n: The hotel is located at the stop before the airport — Seobusan Distribution Area Station, with CU and GS25 convenience stores right across the street.
translations.飯店門口就有公車直達 Skyline Luge。\n\n: There is a direct bus to Skyline Luge right at the hotel entrance.
translations.點了一份火腿起司歐姆蛋吐司＋薯餅＋冰咖啡：$8,400 韓元\n: Ordered a ham and cheese omelette toast + hash browns + iced coffee: 8,400 KRW
translations.點了兩份豬+一份牛+兩碗泡麵+Cass 啤酒，肉一份都是 $18,000 韓元，: Ordered two pork, one beef, two bowls of instant noodles, and Cass beer. Each meat portion was 18,000 KRW. **Actually paid NT$1,060, which is very affordable, and the meat was delicious!! Highly recommend.**
translations.點了炸水餃、糖醋肉(中，感覺可以點小的)、韓式炸醬麵。\n\n: Ordered fried dumplings, sweet and sour pork (medium, felt like a small portion would be enough), and Korean black bean noodles.
translations.點了這個有脆脆的雞肉套餐，Shake Shack 除了招牌我覺得雞肉鮮嫩多汁也很: I ordered the crispy chicken combo. Besides their signature items, I think their chicken is tender and juicy, and really delicious.
translations.點按鈕可以查看當前號碼，時間到也會收到可入場通知信，很方便； **另外，對面、隔: Click the button to check the current number. You will also receive an entry notification email when it's your turn, which is very convenient; **also, be careful as the building opposite and next door are under construction.**
